name: htmel-mobile
description: htmel Mobile - Capacitor, React Native, and Expo replacement.

scripts.deploy:ios: npm run build && cd ios/htmelMobileApp && xcodebuild -workspace htmelMobileApp.xcodeproj/project.xcworkspace -scheme htmelMobileApp -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug
scripts.deploy:android: npm run build && cd android/app && ./gradlew assembleDebug
